title: Effective Covariance Dynamics in Solvable High-Dimensional GANs
summary: We study a solvable high-dimensional model of generative adversarial network (GAN) training in which a linear generator learns a low-dimensional subspace from data with structured latent covariance. Prior solvable GAN analyses assume unconditional signals with diagonal latent covariance; we extend the multi-feature discriminator setting to class-dependent, correlated, and non-zero-mean latent structure. For the quadratic energy discriminator, all such heterogeneity enters the dynamics through a probability-weighted effective second moment. We prove that the stochastic microscopic training process converges, in the high-dimensional limit, to deterministic ordinary differential equations governed by this effective covariance. In the matched-covariance specialization, the stability analysis yields a mode-wise solvable interval determined by the learning rates and noise level: learning begins when the leading effective eigenvalue crosses the lower threshold, while full recovery requires all relevant effective modes to remain within the interval. This reveals a signal-boosting mechanism: low-rank correlations can lift weak directions above the learnability threshold, whereas overly strong correlations destabilize recovery. Numerical simulations validate the ODE, phase boundary, and boosting mechanism. Experiments on MNIST, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-10 further show that informed generator covariance improves alignment with the data-driven reference subspace.

title: Bridging Vision and Language Concepts through Optimal Transport Semantic Flow
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) promise transparent reasoning by predicting through human-interpretable concepts, yet their effectiveness fundamentally depends on how well visual and textual representations are aligned or matched. Existing vision-language CBMs often rely on pre-aligned encoders or global cosine similarity, which obscures fine-grained concept localization and fails to reflect true semantic geometry. In this work, we rethink concept alignment as a dynamic cross-modal transport process instead of static projection and propose the Optimal Transport Flow Concept Bottleneck Model (OTF-CBM). It first learns a data-driven semantic cost via Inverse Optimal Transport to measure cross-modal distances, and then performs unbalanced optimal-transport-based flow matching to model semantic transitions between visual patches and textual concepts. With velocity-based concept activation, OTF-CBM captures interpretable geometric relations without ODE integration. Experiments further show that OTF-CBM achieves superior classification accuracy and concept faithfulness, offering a new geometric and dynamical perspective for interpretable cross-modal reasoning.

AI.motivation: CBM的透明推理依赖于视觉与文本表示的良好对齐，但现有方法的对齐方式过于粗糙，掩盖了细粒度信息且不符合真实语义几何，因此需要一种更精细的动态对齐方法。

title: Data-driven inference of Hopf normal form representations from oscillatory time series
summary: We introduce a data-driven framework that maps noisy oscillatory time series directly onto the Hopf normal form, enabling inference of underlying dynamics without knowledge of governing equations. By embedding the normal form in a probabilistic state-space model, the method jointly infers latent states and system parameters, yielding robust estimates of the natural frequency, Floquet exponent, and asymptotic phase even far from the bifurcation point and under strong noise. Combined with complex Gaussian process regression, the approach further reconstructs phase and amplitude sensitivity functions from data. Benchmarks on the van der Pol oscillator demonstrate substantially improved accuracy and noise robustness compared with existing phase-based and regression methods. This work establishes a direct bridge between normal-form theory and statistical inference, providing a general and practical route to low-dimensional descriptions of oscillatory dynamics in complex systems.

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning-Enhanced Event-Triggered Data-Driven Predictive Control for a 3D Cable-Driven Soft Robotic Arm
summary: Soft robots are challenging to control due to their nonlinear and time-varying dynamics. Data-enabled predictive control (DeePC) offers a model-free alternative by directly leveraging measured input-output trajectories to construct a predictive controller. However, its receding-horizon formulation requires solving a constrained optimization problem at every sampling instant, which can be computationally demanding for real-time deployment on resource-limited robotic platforms.To address this limitation, we propose an adaptive reinforcement-learning-based event-triggered DeePC (RL-ET-DeePC) framework for soft robotic control. A model-free RL policy is trained to determine when to invoke the DeePC optimizer based on the current system state representation, thereby reducing unnecessary optimization calls while preserving closed-loop performance.Simulation results show that RL-ET-DeePC reduces optimization frequency by up to 66% compared to periodic DeePC, while maintaining comparable tracking accuracy. Hardware experiments on a three-dimensional cable-driven soft robotic arm demonstrate zero-shot transfer, achieving a 34% reduction in optimization frequency with tracking accuracy comparable to periodic DeePC and more consistent performance than a static threshold-based event-triggered baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的事件触发DeePC框架，大幅减少软机器人实时控制的优化频率。

AI.key_innovation: 提出RL-ET-DeePC框架，利用无模型强化学习策略自适应地决定何时触发DeePC优化器，而非每个采样时刻均执行优化。
AI.motivation: 软机器人动力学非线性和时变性强，DeePC虽为无模型方法但滚动时域优化的计算需求过高，需要降低实时计算负担。

title: PhysiFormer: Learning to Simulate Mechanics in World Space
summary: We present PhysiFormer, a diffusion transformer for physically-plausible 3D object motion. Unlike video world models that operate in view-dependent pixel space, PhysiFormer represents objects as 3D meshes expressed in world coordinates. Given the initial vertex positions and velocities, as well as object material type, rigid or elastic, the model samples future vertex trajectories. While related neural physics approaches build on ad-hoc latent spaces or explicitly enforce rigidity and causality, PhysiFormer shows that excellent results can be obtained without any such inductive biases, by casting vertex trajectory prediction as a single denoising diffusion process directly in world coordinates. The probabilistic formulation captures uncertainty in the learned dynamics, enabling diverse plausible futures from initial conditions, making this framework potentially useful for applications with unobserved uncertainty. The model features attention factorised over time, space, and objects for efficiency, enabling permutation-invariant multi-object reasoning without needing explicit object encoding. Trained on over 100k simulated trajectories, PhysiFormer generates rigid and elastic mechanics, and generalises to mixed-material settings, unseen real-world geometries, and larger object counts. It substantially outperforms autoregressive baselines in trajectory accuracy, rigidity preservation, and momentum-based physical consistency. Our results position coordinate-space diffusion as a promising step toward view-invariant, geometry-aware world modelling for robotics, graphics, and physical design. Visualisations, code, and models are available at https://yimingc9.github.io/physiformer.

AI.tldr: 提出直接在世界坐标系中用扩散变换器预测3D物体物理运动，无需刚性或因果性等归纳偏置即可生成多样合理的未来轨迹。

title: Explainable Control Framework (XCF) based on Fuzzy Model-Agnostic Explanation and LLM Agent-Supported Interface
summary: Increasing demand for precise and reliable control in complex scenarios has led to the development of increasingly sophisticated controllers, including data-driven approaches employing closed box models and mathematically rigorous yet complex designs. This complexity highlights the needs for explainable control that can provide human-understandable insights into controller behavior. In this paper, an explainable control framework (XCF) along with supporting algorithms and user interface are proposed to explain how controllers determine their control actions and their underlying working mechanism. The novel contributions of this work are threefold: First, the XCF is designed to provide model-agnostic explanations for controllers in closed-loop systems and can optionally refine local explanations by system response dynamics. Second, a novel explanation method, hierarchical fuzzy model-agnostic explanation for control systems (HFMAE-C), is proposed based on the designed framework. The HFMAE-C employs a fuzzy logic system to approximate the controller's behavior and system dynamics, providing sample, local, domain and universe level explanations via IF-THEN rules revealing the controller's decision logic and salience values quantifying the contribution of system states to control actions. Third, a large language model agent-supported user interface is developed to automatically analyze user requirements, select appropriate algorithms, interpret the generated explanations to a natural language report, and provide interactive consultation. Case studies on inverted pendulum system and Turtlebot obstacle avoidance demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through simulated user experiments and quantitative comparisons with mainstream explainable control approaches.

title: Continual Robot Policy Learning via Variational Neural Dynamics
summary: Robots deployed in the real world rarely operate under a single fixed dynamics model: wind changes, payloads vary, batteries drain, contacts shift, and hardware wears. Yet most learning-based controllers are trained once and deployed as if learning were complete. This prevents the robot from using deployment experience to further improve task performance. In this work, we propose a continual learning framework that uses real-world experience to improve robot policies under hidden and recurring dynamics. Our method learns a condition-aware dynamics model from real state-action trajectories by combining an analytical physics prior with a neural residual for unmodeled effects. A recurrent encoder infers the current hidden condition from recent interaction, and this estimate conditions both the residual model and the policy. Policy learning is performed via differentiable simulation using diverse learned dynamics sampled from the latent model. At deployment, these sampled conditions are replaced by conditions inferred online from recent real interaction, allowing the policy to recover recurring dynamics by recognition rather than residual re-fitting. Through extensive simulation studies and real-world experiments, we demonstrate that the framework improves policy performance under diverse unobserved disturbances. On real quadrotor trajectory tracking under changing wind, the policy recovers from recurring disturbances in roughly 1s, about 5x faster than online residual re-fitting. It also reduces large-disturbance hover and tracking errors by 65.7% and 53.3% over the state-of-the-art online adaptation approaches

title: Hyperiax and Phylogenetic Inference from Shape Data
summary: Phylogenetic inference on high-dimensional morphological traits requires algorithms that account for both the nonlinear geometry of the shape data and the phylogenetic tree structure. The Backward Filtering Forward Guiding (BFFG) framework provides smoothing for nonlinear stochastic processes on trees and enables inference of parameters and ancestral states. As practical adoption has been limited by a lack of efficient implementations, we present Hyperiax, an open-source library for tree traversal algorithms and message passing using JAX, designed particularly to support operations needed for BFFG. Hyperiax enables efficient execution of operations on trees with large numbers of nodes and, coupled with the BFFG-specific operations, this allows efficient inference in both discrete-time and stochastic differential equation models. Concretely, we demonstrate that Hyperiax enables parameter inference and ancestral reconstruction for butterfly wing shapes represented by landmarks in two dimensions, and analyses of avian beaks from landmarks in three dimensions. Both cases demonstrate application of BFFG on two substantially larger phylogenetic trees with 850 and 696 nodes with higher resolution shape data (118 two-dimensional landmarks and 79 three-dimensional landmarks, specifically) than previously possible.

AI.method: 利用JAX构建Hyperiax库，实现树遍历算法和消息传递机制，集成BFFG专用操作，支持离散时间和SDE模型的参数推断与祖先状态重建。

title: Collective variables for homophily-driven network rewiring dynamics
summary: Stochastic network rewiring processes, in which edges dynamically rewire based on fixed node attributes, are widely used in applications ranging from social dynamics to neuroscience and form an important component of adaptive network modelling. In this paper, we identify low-dimensional collective variables (CVs) that capture the essential macroscopic behavior of such time-evolving networks and enable reduced-order descriptions of their dynamics. To this end, we apply the data-driven transition manifold approach to homophily-driven rewiring models, in which edges preferentially connect nodes with similar attributes. For two representative models, we find that the optimal CV is a consensus measure quantifying the fraction of edges whose incident nodes differ by less than a certain threshold. Building on the learned CV, we construct reduced macroscopic models using a data-driven approach based on sparse regression and through an analytical derivation using graphons. The latter yields a closed-form evolution equation for the consensus measure and analytically validates the identified CV.

title: Generative Models on Analog Hardware with Dynamics
summary: Analog hardware platforms such as coupled oscillators and Analog Ising Machines naturally solve differential equations at a fraction of the energy cost of digital computation, making them attractive for low-power generative modeling, yet a fundamental mismatch exists: modern generative models assume flexible, software-defined dynamics, whereas analog hardware imposes fixed, physics-determined differential equations with limited approximation capacity. This paper introduces Analog Interaction Systems (AIS), a unified framework for hardware-implementable dynamical systems, and empirically characterizes their expressivity gap relative to neural network baselines. Two hardware-compatible mechanisms are proposed to narrow this gap - time-varying piecewise parameters and hidden physical states - and a Wasserstein GAN training procedure is developed to enable training of these models without requiring them to follow a specific trajectory. We characterize how area and power scale with connection density and precision, showing that sparse connectivity and low-bit-width quantized parameters are necessary for practical implementation, and estimate an energy cost of 23uJ per generated image for the chosen architecture, representing a 2-orders-of-magnitude improvement over digital baselines. On MNIST and Fashion-MNIST, our oscillator-based AIS achieves FID scores of 27.6 and 80.8, outperforming the best prior hardware-implementable analog generative models by 3-4x with a 4-bit sparse architecture.

AI.tldr: 提出模拟交互系统框架，通过分段参数和隐物理状态缩小模拟硬件与神经网络的生成能力差距，能效提升两个数量级。

title: Onsager--Machlup functionals for McKean--Vlasov SDEs via Euler-type approximation
summary: The Onsager--Machlup action functional provides a variational framework for characterizing the most probable transition paths of stochastic systems and plays an important role in the study of nonequilibrium fluctuations. Its extension to McKean--Vlasov stochastic differential equations is complicated by the intrinsic distribution dependence of the coefficients. In this paper, we address this difficulty by introducing an Euler-type approximation scheme based on classical, distribution-free stochastic differential equations. Combining the classical Onsager--Machlup theory with a convergence argument for the approximation sequence, we derive an explicit expression for the Onsager--Machlup functional associated with the McKean--Vlasov SDE. The proposed approach is constructive and extends to a broad class of distribution-dependent stochastic systems.

title: Neural operator-based digital twins for modeling amyloid-$β$ and tau propagation and treatment optimization in Alzheimer's disease
summary: Accurately predicting the spatiotemporal evolution of amyloid-$β$ and tau proteins at the individual level is critical for improving the diagnosis and treatment of Alzheimer's disease. We consider the problem of constructing patient-specific digital twins that model the propagation of these biomarkers on the cortical surface using reaction--diffusion dynamics. A major challenge is that the underlying nonlinear aggregation mechanisms are unknown and must be inferred from sparse, noisy, and heterogeneous longitudinal PET imaging data. To address this, we develop a data-driven framework that learns biomarker dynamics directly from clinical observations. The approach combines operator learning with reduced-order representations to infer governing equations of disease progression from data. Using this framework, we achieve predictive accuracies of 87\% for amyloid-$β$ and 81\% for tau. Building on the learned dynamics, we further formulate a PDE-constrained optimal control problem to design personalized therapeutic strategies that regulate pathological protein propagation. By integrating data-driven dynamical modeling with treatment optimization, the proposed digital twin framework provides an interpretable and predictive platform for understanding disease progression and enabling precision interventions in neurodegenerative disorders.

title: BOWConnect: Parallel Bayesian Optimization over Windows with Learned Local Cost Maps for Sample-Efficient Kinodynamic Motion Planning
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: This paper presents BOWConnect, a bidirectional parallel kinodynamic motion planner that addresses three fundamental limitations of existing sampling-based methods: sample inefficiency in high-dimensional state spaces, unreliable cost heuristics under dynamic constraints, and poor performance in narrow passage environments. Unlike classical planners that rely on random control sampling and geometric distance heuristics, BOWConnect integrates Bayesian Optimization over Windows (BOW) as a learning-based steering function within a parallel tree-based exploration framework, enabling each worker to learn local cost maps and constraints to guide sampling toward dynamically feasible and collision-free controls. A bidirectional architecture simultaneously grows forward and backward trees from the start and goal regions in parallel threads, with a spatial hashing mechanism enabling fast connection queries and a boundary value problem solver generating kinodynamically consistent bridge trajectories. Extensive evaluations across ten benchmark environments demonstrate that BOWConnect achieves 100\% success while delivering the fastest or near-fastest planning time in complex scenarios, including narrow passages and non-convex spaces where state-of-the-art planners fail or degrade substantially. Real-world deployment on a ground vehicle and a quadrotor confirms real-time planning with no collisions. Videos of real-world and simulated experiments, high-resolution versions of the figures, and the open-source code are available at https://bow-connect.github.io/.

title: Kolmogorov Arnold networks (KAN) for aerodynamic prediction: a comparison with MLPs and GNNs
summary: Kolmogorov Arnold networks (KAN) have recently been introduced as a (deep) neural network architecture whose trainable parameters adapt the activation functions, instead of the coefficients of the affine transformations at the core of traditional architectures such as deep multilayer perceptrons (MLPs). This architecture builds on the Kolmogorov-Arnold theorem, which endows it with universal approximation properties. While the advent of KANs has been received with excitement, there is a current debate about the possible KAN supremacy over deep multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) for classic fields such as symbolic regression, generic-purpose machine learning, natural language processing or computer vision. Here we assess the performance of KANs --and its nuanced comparison against MLPs and graph neural networks (GNNs)-- in the realm of fluid dynamics surrogate modelling. To that aim, we consider the task of predicting the surface pressure distribution over subsonic and transonic airfoils, a canonical task in aerodynamics. Our results show that KAN models show good performance in predicting the whole pressure coefficients and is able to interpolate across Mach numbers and angles of attack, however its performance is comparable --marginally inferior-- to a suitably trained MLP, where best performance is achieved by a GNN at the expense or requiring lengthier training. While the optimal KAN model have typically much lower complexity than MLP and GNN --hence resulting in faster training--, we find that KANs suffer from training instabilities, and their performance is highly dependent on a proper hyperparameter optimisation.

AI.tldr: KAN在翼型压力预测中表现良好但略逊于MLP，训练更快但存在不稳定性和超参数敏感问题。
AI.translated_summary: Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）最近被提出作为一种（深度）神经网络架构，其可训练参数用于自适应激活函数，而非传统架构（如深度多层感知机MLP）中仿射变换的系数。该架构基于Kolmogorov-Arnold定理，赋予其通用近似特性。尽管KAN的出现引起了广泛关注，但关于KAN在符号回归、通用机器学习、自然语言处理或计算机视觉等经典领域是否优于深度多层感知机（MLP）仍存在争议。本文评估了KAN在流体动力学代理建模领域的性能，并与MLP和图神经网络（GNN）进行了细致的比较。为此，我们考虑了预测亚音速和跨音速翼型表面压力分布的任务，这是空气动力学中的一个经典任务。结果表明，KAN模型在预测整体压力系数方面表现良好，能够在马赫数和攻角之间进行插值，但其性能与经过适当训练的MLP相当——略逊一筹，而GNN在以更长训练时间为代价的情况下取得了最佳性能。虽然最优KAN模型通常比MLP和GNN复杂度低得多——从而训练更快——但我们发现KAN存在训练不稳定的问题，且其性能高度依赖于适当的超参数优化。

title: Mean-Field PhiBE: Continuous-Time Mean-Field Reinforcement Learning from Discrete-Time Data
summary: This paper addresses model-free continuous-time mean-field control in a setting where the population dynamics evolve continuously according to an unknown McKean-Vlasov stochastic differential equation, while only discrete-time transition data are available. In the model-based formulation, policy evaluation is naturally described by a stationary Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation on $\mathcal P_2(\mathbb R^d)$, but this equation involves the drift and diffusion coefficients of the controlled McKean-Vlasov dynamics, which are not identifiable when only discrete-time data are available. On the other hand, a direct reduction to a time-discrete Bellman equation avoids the non-identifiability issue but loses the differential equation structure. To bridge these two viewpoints, we introduce a Mean-Field-PhiBE (MF-PhiBE), which incorporates discrete-time transition information into a continuous-time PDE on the Wasserstein space. The MF-PhiBE replaces the unknown infinitesimal drift and covariance in the policy-evaluation equation by one-step estimators computed from data, while preserving the generator structure of the McKean-Vlasov HJB equation. We also derive a policy-gradient theorem for entropy-regularized randomized feedback policies, expressing the actor direction through an action-wise infinitesimal advantage and the score of the policy. Combining these two ingredients yields a model-free actor-critic method. We prove a first-order consistency estimate showing that the value induced by an optimal MF-PhiBE policy approximates the optimal continuous-time value with an error of order $Δt$. In the linear-quadratic case, we show our approximation achieves second-order accuracy with only one-step data. Numerical experiments on an LQR benchmark and a crowd-aversion problem illustrate the proposed framework.

AI.experiments: 在LQR基准问题和人群规避问题上进行数值实验，验证所提框架的有效性。
AI.result: 证明了一阶一致性估计：最优MF-PhiBE策略的值以$O(\Delta t)$误差逼近最优连续时间值；线性二次情形下仅用一步数据即达到二阶精度。
AI.conclusion: MF-PhiBE成功弥合了连续时间HJB方程与离散时间Bellman方程之间的差距，在不可辨识条件下实现了无模型连续时间均场控制，并具有可证明的收敛精度。

categories: 数据驱动有效动力学/降阶建模
title: Data-driven inference of Hopf normal form representations from oscillatory time series
summary: We introduce a data-driven framework that maps noisy oscillatory time series directly onto the Hopf normal form, enabling inference of underlying dynamics without knowledge of governing equations. By embedding the normal form in a probabilistic state-space model, the method jointly infers latent states and system parameters, yielding robust estimates of the natural frequency, Floquet exponent, and asymptotic phase even far from the bifurcation point and under strong noise. Combined with complex Gaussian process regression, the approach further reconstructs phase and amplitude sensitivity functions from data. Benchmarks on the van der Pol oscillator demonstrate substantially improved accuracy and noise robustness compared with existing phase-based and regression methods. This work establishes a direct bridge between normal-form theory and statistical inference, providing a general and practical route to low-dimensional descriptions of oscillatory dynamics in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 提出将含噪振荡序列直接映射到Hopf规范型的数据驱动框架，实现无方程的动力学推断。
AI.translated_summary: 我们引入了一个数据驱动的框架，将含噪振荡时间序列直接映射到Hopf规范型上，从而在不知道控制方程的情况下推断底层动力学。通过将规范型嵌入概率状态空间模型中，该方法联合推断潜在状态和系统参数，即使在远离分岔点且存在强噪声的情况下，也能对固有频率、Floquet指数和渐近相位给出稳健的估计。结合复高斯过程回归，该方法还能从数据中重建相位和振幅敏感度函数。在van der Pol振荡器上的基准测试表明，与现有的基于相位和回归的方法相比，本方法在精度和噪声鲁棒性方面均有显著提升。本工作在规范型理论与统计推断之间建立了直接桥梁，为复杂系统中振荡动力学的低维描述提供了一条通用且实用的途径。
AI.research_problem: 在不知道控制方程的情况下，如何从含噪振荡时间序列中准确推断底层动力学参数（如固有频率、Floquet指数、渐近相位），尤其是在远离分岔点且噪声较强的条件下，现有方法精度和鲁棒性不足。
AI.key_innovation: 将Hopf规范型嵌入概率状态空间模型，实现潜在状态与系统参数的联合推断，并结合复高斯过程回归重建相位和振幅敏感度函数，在规范型理论与统计推断之间建立直接桥梁。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统中的振荡动力学通常缺乏已知的控制方程，且实际数据常伴随强噪声，现有基于相位和回归的方法在远离分岔点或强噪声条件下精度不足，需要一种无需方程知识即可稳健推断动力学参数的方法。
AI.method: 将Hopf规范型嵌入概率状态空间模型，联合推断潜在状态与系统参数（固有频率、Floquet指数、渐近相位）；进一步结合复高斯过程回归，从数据中重建相位和振幅敏感度函数。
AI.experiments: 在van der Pol振荡器上进行基准测试，与现有基于相位和回归的方法进行对比。
AI.result: 在精度和噪声鲁棒性方面相比现有方法有显著提升，即使在远离分岔点和强噪声条件下也能给出稳健的参数估计。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在规范型理论与统计推断之间建立了直接桥梁，为复杂系统中振荡动力学的低维描述提供了一条通用且实用的途径。

categories: 随机微分方程识别
title: Physics-guided Convolutional Neural Network for Domain Growth Prediction in Systems with Conserved Kinetics
summary: The spatiotemporal evolution of many physical, chemical, and biological systems is described by nonlinear partial differential equations (PDEs). Recently, deep neural network-based surrogate models have gained increasing interest as efficient alternatives to computationally expensive traditional numerical solvers. In this work, we propose an attention-based, physics-guided convolutional neural network as a surrogate model to learn the microstructural evolution of such systems. We train the model to accurately predict the full time-evolution of phase separation in binary mixtures governed by the Cahn-Hilliard equation. We show that predictions from our trained surrogate model remain stable and accurate over long-time rollouts for both critical and off-critical mixtures and preserve the mixture composition throughout evolution. We also show that our model accurately captures the growth of domain size and is consistent with the Lifshitz-Slyozov domain-growth law. The prediction results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for modeling systems with conserved kinetics and can be extended to other complex dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于注意力机制的物理引导CNN代理模型，准确预测Cahn-Hilliard方程描述的相分离长时间演化。
AI.translated_summary: 许多物理、化学和生物系统的时空演化由非线性偏微分方程描述。近年来，基于深度神经网络的代理模型作为计算代价高昂的传统数值求解器的高效替代方案，受到了越来越多的关注。在本工作中，我们提出了一种基于注意力机制的物理引导卷积神经网络，作为代理模型来学习此类系统的微观结构演化。我们训练该模型以准确预测由Cahn-Hilliard方程支配的二元混合物中相分离的完整时间演化。我们表明，训练后的代理模型的预测在临界和非临界混合物的长时间推演中均保持稳定和准确，并在整个演化过程中保持混合物组成不变。我们还表明，该模型准确捕捉了畴尺寸的增长，并与Lifshitz-Slyozov畴增长定律一致。预测结果证明了所提出框架在建模具有守恒动力学的系统方面的有效性，并可扩展至其他复杂动力系统。
AI.research_problem: 传统数值求解器计算代价高昂，需要高效的深度学习代理模型来学习非线性偏微分方程描述的系统微观结构演化，同时需保证长时间预测的稳定性和物理守恒性。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了一种结合注意力机制与物理引导的卷积神经网络代理模型，能够在长时间推演中保持预测稳定性并守恒混合物组成。
AI.motivation: 非线性偏微分方程描述的物理、化学和生物系统的传统数值求解计算成本高，深度神经网络代理模型可提供高效替代方案。
AI.method: 构建基于注意力机制的物理引导卷积神经网络作为代理模型，训练其预测Cahn-Hilliard方程支配的二元混合物相分离的完整时间演化过程。
AI.experiments: 在临界和非临界二元混合物上测试模型的长时间推演预测能力，验证混合物组成守恒性、畴尺寸增长规律以及与Lifshitz-Slyozov定律的一致性。
AI.result: 模型在长时间推演中预测保持稳定准确，混合物组成在整个演化过程中守恒，畴尺寸增长与Lifshitz-Slyozov定律一致。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架在建模具有守恒动力学的系统方面有效，并可扩展至其他复杂动力系统。

categories: 工程/金融/生物/电力应用
title: Implementation of reinforcement learning in chemical reaction networks: application to phototaxis as curiosity-driven exploration
comment: This paper is accepted as talk at ALIFE 2026 (Waterloo, Canada)
summary: Living systems navigate environments using noisy and incomplete sensory signals. In unicellular algae, phototaxis is often modeled as a mechanistic run--tumble process driven by stimulus--response rules. However, such descriptions overlook how organisms actively sample their environment to reduce sensory ambiguity. From a minimal cognition perspective, we reframe this navigation as a subjective, information-driven sensorimotor process. To this end, we propose a framework linking a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) with biochemical reaction dynamics. Environmental variables are hidden, while the cell updates a minimal internal state from each observation through a memoryless Bayesian step. These internal dynamics balance orienting toward light with exploratory reorientation and can be implemented through Chemical-Reaction-Network Ordinary Differential Equations (CRN--ODEs). Our model includes a biophysical observation process for photoreception and a chemically computable polynomial bound on information gain. Using Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) on 30 experimentally recorded Chlamydomonas trajectories, we infer the behavioral objective consistent with observed phototactic motion and benchmark the resulting dynamics with standard Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA) baselines. Our model reproduces the empirical alignment-to-light distribution, comparable to objective SSA baselines on this dataset. Within this framework, run--tumble alternation emerges as an information-acquisition strategy: tumbling reorients the cell to sample new sensory configurations and resolve sensor ambiguity, demonstrating how intracellular biochemical networks can support adaptive information-seeking behavior in cellular navigation.

AI.tldr: 将单细胞藻类趋光导航重构为信息驱动的POMDP过程，揭示翻滚行为是降低感官模糊的信息获取策略。
AI.translated_summary: 生命系统利用噪声且不完整的感官信号在环境中导航。在单细胞藻类中，趋光性通常被建模为由刺激-反应规则驱动的机制性游动-翻滚过程。然而，此类描述忽略了生物体如何主动采样其环境以降低感官模糊性。从最小认知的视角出发，我们将这种导航重新构建为一个主观的、信息驱动的感觉运动过程。为此，我们提出了一个将部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）与生化反应动力学相联系的框架。环境变量是隐藏的，而细胞通过无记忆的贝叶斯步骤从每次观测中更新一个最小化的内部状态。这些内部动力学在朝向光源定向与探索性重新定向之间取得平衡，并可通过化学反应网络常微分方程（CRN-ODEs）实现。我们的模型包含一个用于光感受的生物物理观测过程，以及一个化学可计算的信息增益多项式上界。利用逆强化学习（IRL）对30条实验记录的衣藻轨迹进行分析，我们推断出与观测到的趋光运动一致的行为目标，并将所得动力学与标准随机模拟算法（SSA）基线进行基准比较。我们的模型重现了经验性的对光取向分布，在该数据集上与目标SSA基线具有可比性。在该框架内，游动-翻滚交替作为一种信息获取策略而涌现：翻滚使细胞重新定向以采样新的感官配置并解决传感器模糊性，展示了胞内生化网络如何支持细胞导航中的适应性信息寻求行为。
AI.research_problem: 传统趋光性模型将单细胞藻类导航视为机制性的刺激-反应过程，忽略了生物体如何主动采样环境以降低感官模糊性这一关键问题。
AI.key_innovation: 将POMDP与生化反应动力学耦合，通过无记忆贝叶斯更新和CRN-ODEs实现内部状态动力学，并将翻滚行为重新解释为信息获取策略而非单纯的刺激-反应。
AI.motivation: 从最小认知视角出发，认为细胞导航不应仅被视为被动的刺激-反应过程，而应被理解为主观的、信息驱动的感觉运动过程，以弥补传统模型对主动环境采样行为的忽视。
AI.method: 构建POMDP与生化反应动力学的耦合框架，环境变量为隐藏状态，细胞通过无记忆贝叶斯步骤更新最小内部状态；内部动力学由CRN-ODEs实现，包含生物物理光感受观测过程和信息增益多项式上界；利用逆强化学习从实验轨迹中推断行为目标。
AI.experiments: 在30条实验记录的衣藻（Chlamydomonas）轨迹上应用逆强化学习推断行为目标，并将模型生成的动力学与标准随机模拟算法（SSA）基线进行基准对比。
AI.result: 模型成功重现了经验性的对光取向分布，在该数据集上与目标SSA基线表现相当；游动-翻滚交替作为信息获取策略自然涌现，翻滚使细胞重新定向以采样新感官配置并解决传感器模糊性。
AI.conclusion: 胞内生化网络能够支持细胞导航中的适应性信息寻求行为；翻滚并非单纯的机制性反应，而是降低感官模糊性的主动信息获取策略，体现了单细胞水平上的最小认知特征。

categories: 随机系统预测与突变预警
title: One-shot prediction of noise-induced bifurcations with reservoir computing
summary: Dynamical systems can exhibit complex responses when noise is injected. In particular, dynamics can be qualitatively altered by dynamic noise, a phenomenon known as noise-induced bifurcation. Predicting noise-induced bifurcations is a critical challenge in nonlinear physics. Recently, it has been reported that reservoir computing, a machine learning framework, can reconstruct the unseen global structure of a dynamical system, including bifurcations, from limited time series data. However, learning global structures in random dynamical systems has not yet been systematically addressed. In this study, we report that a simple reservoir computing framework can predict the noise-induced bifurcation structure from the time series at a single noise condition. We demonstrate dynamic noise cancellation and the reconstruction of entire noise-induced bifurcation structures, including noise-induced chaos and noise-induced order, in representative dynamical systems. Additionally, we provide a theoretical explanation for noise cancellation and demonstrate noise cancellation of a neuromorphic spintronics device. Our results provide significant insights into understanding and harnessing real-world noisy complex dynamics.

AI.tldr: 储备池计算可从单一噪声条件的时间序列预测噪声诱导分岔结构。
AI.translated_summary: 动力系统在注入噪声时可以表现出复杂的响应。特别是，动态噪声可以定性地改变动力学行为，这种现象被称为噪声诱导分岔。预测噪声诱导分岔是非线性物理中的一个关键挑战。最近有报道指出，储备池计算这一机器学习框架可以从有限的时间序列数据中重构动力系统不可见的全局结构，包括分岔。然而，随机动力系统中全局结构的学习尚未得到系统性研究。在本研究中，我们报告了一个简单的储备池计算框架可以从单一噪声条件下的时间序列预测噪声诱导的分岔结构。我们在代表性动力系统中展示了动态噪声消除以及整个噪声诱导分岔结构的重构，包括噪声诱导混沌和噪声诱导有序。此外，我们为噪声消除提供了理论解释，并展示了神经形态自旋电子学器件的噪声消除。我们的结果为理解和利用现实世界中含噪声的复杂动力学提供了重要见解。
AI.research_problem: 随机动力系统中全局结构的学习尚未得到系统性研究，尤其是如何从有限时间序列数据预测噪声诱导的分岔结构。
AI.key_innovation: 提出简单的储备池计算框架，仅需单一噪声条件下的时间序列即可预测并重构整个噪声诱导分岔结构，同时实现动态噪声消除。
AI.motivation: 噪声诱导分岔是非线性物理中的关键挑战，预测此类分岔对理解和控制真实世界中含噪声的复杂动力学具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用储备池计算框架，从单一噪声条件下的时间序列数据学习动力系统的全局结构，实现噪声消除与分岔结构重构，并给出理论解释。
AI.experiments: 在代表性动力系统中验证了噪声诱导混沌和噪声诱导有序的分岔结构重构与动态噪声消除，并在神经形态自旋电子学器件上展示了噪声消除效果。
AI.result: 成功从单一噪声条件的时间序列预测了完整的噪声诱导分岔结构，实现了动态噪声消除，理论与实验均支持该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解和利用现实世界中含噪声的复杂动力学提供了重要见解，展示了储备池计算在随机动力系统全局结构学习中的潜力。

categories: 工程/金融/生物/电力应用
title: Deep learning model emulators for marine biogeochemistry forecasting from days to decades
comment: 53 pages, 25 figures (incl. 10 in the Appendix), submitted to Biogeosciences
summary: Deep-learning emulators have emerged as a promising approach for reducing the computational cost of Earth System Models while potentially improving forecasting skill. Here, we demonstrate the successful emulation of a high-complexity marine biogeochemistry model within a simplified one-dimensional water-column framework. We explore two emulator architectures: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks that emulate a selected subset of variables at daily resolution, and physics-informed one-dimensional Convolutional Neural Networks (1D CNNs) that emulate the full pelagic system throughout the water column also at daily resolution. Using ocean physics simulator inputs, both emulators remain largely stable over multi-decadal timescales and accurately reproduce the parent model in both decadal climate projections and short-range (10-day) forecasting applications. The former includes the ability to predict the timing of phytoplankton Spring blooms several years in advance. When trained on reanalysis data, the emulators substantially outperform the parent model's forecast skill score for several key ecosystem variables, including phytoplankton and zooplankton. If similar performance can be achieved in three-dimensional regional applications, these emulators could provide substantially higher-quality predictions at a fraction of the computational cost. We further apply novel explainability techniques to identify key drivers of emulator behaviour and gain insights into emergent ecosystem dynamics. Performance is evaluated using a range of metrics, including the reproduction of daily variability and extreme events. These approaches have considerable potential for future applications in operational forecasting, climate-scale simulations, and marine autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: 深度学习模拟器成功模拟海洋生物地球化学模型，在预测精度和计算效率上均优于传统母模型。
AI.translated_summary: 深度学习模拟器已成为降低地球系统模型计算成本同时潜在提高预报技能的有前景的方法。在此，我们展示了在简化的一维水柱框架内成功模拟高复杂度海洋生物地球化学模型。我们探索了两种模拟器架构：长短期记忆（LSTM）神经网络以日分辨率模拟选定变量子集，以及物理信息一维卷积神经网络（1D CNN）以日分辨率模拟整个水柱的远洋系统。使用海洋物理模拟器输入，两种模拟器在多十年时间尺度上保持基本稳定，并在十年气候预测和短程（10天）预报应用中准确再现母模型。前者包括提前数年预测浮游植物春季水华时机的能力。当使用再分析数据进行训练时，模拟器在多个关键生态系统变量（包括浮游植物和浮游动物）的预报技能评分上大幅优于母模型。如果在三维区域应用中能够实现类似性能，这些模拟器可以以极低的计算成本提供更高质量的预测。我们进一步应用新颖的可解释性技术来识别模拟器行为的关键驱动因素，并获得对新兴生态系统动态的洞察。性能评估使用了包括日变异性和极端事件再现在内的多种指标。这些方法在未来业务化预报、气候尺度模拟和海洋自主系统应用方面具有巨大潜力。
AI.research_problem: 地球系统模型中的海洋生物地球化学模型计算成本高昂，需要在不牺牲预测精度的前提下降低计算开销并提高预报技能。
AI.key_innovation: 提出两种深度学习模拟器架构（LSTM和物理信息1D CNN）模拟高复杂度海洋生物地球化学模型，并结合可解释性技术识别模拟器行为的关键驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 海洋生物地球化学模型计算成本高昂，深度学习模拟器有望在大幅降低计算开销的同时提高预报技能，对业务化预报和气候尺度模拟具有重要意义。
AI.method: 在简化的一维水柱框架内，开发LSTM神经网络（模拟选定变量子集）和物理信息1D CNN（模拟整个远洋系统）两种架构，均以日分辨率运行，使用海洋物理模拟器输入和再分析数据进行训练，并应用可解释性技术分析模拟器行为。
AI.experiments: 在多十年时间尺度上评估两种模拟器的稳定性，测试其在十年气候预测和短程（10天）预报中的表现，包括浮游植物春季水华时机预测；使用再分析数据训练后与母模型预报技能进行对比，并采用日变异性和极端事件等多种指标评估性能。
AI.result: 两种模拟器在多十年时间尺度上保持稳定，准确再现母模型；在再分析数据训练下，模拟器在浮游植物和浮游动物等关键变量的预报技能评分上大幅优于母模型，并能提前数年预测春季水华时机。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模拟器在海洋生物地球化学建模方面具有巨大潜力，可在极低计算成本下提供更高质量预测，未来可应用于业务化预报、气候尺度模拟和海洋自主系统。
AI.limitations: 目前仅在简化的一维水柱框架内验证，若要在三维区域应用中实现类似性能仍需进一步研究。

categories: 随机微分方程识别
title: Numerical Approximation for Path-Dependent McKean-Vlasov Control with Non-Asymptotic Error Estimates
summary: Path-dependent McKean--Vlasov (MKV) control models large interacting populations with history-dependent dynamics and costs. This paper develops a unified approximation-and-learning framework for continuous time path-dependent MKV problem under open-loop controls. First, an Euler discretization scheme with piecewise-constant controls is shown to achieve a non-asymptotic error of $O(h^{1/4})$. Second, we establish a discrete dynamic programming principle and prove value equivalence between open-loop and history-dependent feedback controls, enabling optimization on a reduced filtration. Third, an interacting particle system is introduced to approximate the continuous-time value, yielding an overall error bound of $O(h^{1/4}) + O(M^{-γ})$ for $M$ particles and an explicitly given $γ> 0$. Finally, we propose a fully implementable neural-network policy-gradient method using pathwise features. Numerical experiments, including a path-dependent linear-quadratic benchmark, demonstrate the effectiveness of the algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出路径依赖McKean-Vlasov控制的统一逼近与学习框架，结合Euler离散化、粒子系统与神经网络策略梯度方法。
AI.translated_summary: 路径依赖的McKean-Vlasov（MKV）控制用于建模具有历史依赖动力学和成本的大规模交互种群。本文针对开环控制下的连续时间路径依赖MKV问题，发展了一个统一的逼近与学习框架。首先，证明了采用分段常数控制的Euler离散化方案可实现O(h^{1/4})的非渐近误差。其次，建立了离散动态规划原理，并证明了开环控制与历史依赖反馈控制之间的值等价性，从而能够在约化滤波上进行优化。第三，引入交互粒子系统来逼近连续时间值，对于M个粒子给出了整体误差界O(h^{1/4})+O(M^{-γ})，其中γ>0被显式给出。最后，提出了一种基于路径特征的全可实现神经网络策略梯度方法。包括路径依赖线性二次基准在内的数值实验验证了算法的有效性。
AI.research_problem: 连续时间路径依赖McKean-Vlasov控制问题缺乏统一的数值逼近与学习求解框架，尤其是在开环控制下如何实现可证明误差界的离散化与可实现的算法。
AI.key_innovation: 将Euler离散化、离散动态规划原理与开环-反馈控制值等价性、交互粒子系统逼近以及神经网络策略梯度方法统一在一个框架内，并给出完整的非渐近误差分析。
AI.motivation: 路径依赖MKV控制可建模大规模交互种群的历史依赖动力学与成本，但连续时间问题的数值求解和可实现学习算法缺乏系统性理论与方法。
AI.method: 采用分段常数控制的Euler离散化方案；建立离散动态规划原理并证明开环与历史依赖反馈控制的值等价性以实现约化滤波上的优化；引入交互粒子系统逼近连续时间值；提出基于路径特征的神经网络策略梯度算法。
AI.experiments: 在路径依赖线性二次基准问题及其他数值实例上验证所提神经网络策略梯度算法的有效性。
AI.result: Euler离散化达到O(h^{1/4})非渐近误差；粒子系统逼近的整体误差界为O(h^{1/4})+O(M^{-γ})，γ>0显式给出；数值实验验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的统一逼近与学习框架为连续时间路径依赖MKV控制问题提供了具有理论误差保证且可实现数值求解的完整方案。

title: Zero-Shot Size Transfer for Neural ODEs on Sparse Random Graphs: Graphon Limits and Adjoint Convergence
summary: Graph Neural Differential Equations (GNDEs) model continuous-time graph dynamics by parameterizing Neural ODE velocity fields with Graph Neural Networks. Their local, size-independent filters suggest a zero-shot size-transfer principle: train on a small graph and deploy on larger, similar graphs without retraining. We develop a quantitative theory for this principle on sparse random graphs sampled from graphons. We consider Graphon Neural Differential Equations (Graphon-NDEs) and adjoint Graphon-NDEs as the infinite-node limits of the forward and adjoint GNDE systems, and establish well-posedness. For an $n$-node random graph with sparsity parameter $α_n$, we prove trajectory-wise convergence of GNDE solutions to Graphon-NDE solutions at rate $O((α_n n)^{-1/2})$, up to logarithmic factors, with high probability. We also establish uniform-in-time convergence bounds for adjoint systems governing hidden-state and parameter gradients. We further study discretize-then-optimize (DTO) and optimize-then-discretize (OTD) training. Under explicit Euler discretization with $M$ steps, we show that DTO and OTD are asymptotically consistent, with hidden-state and local parameter-gradient discrepancies of orders $O(1/M)$ and $O(1/M^2)$, respectively, up to sparsity and logarithmic factors. Experiments on HSBM and tent graphons support the theoretical rates, while zero-shot transfer experiments across four graphon classes demonstrate accurate deployment of learned GNDEs on larger independently sampled graphs.

AI.tldr: 本文为图神经微分方程的零样本尺寸迁移建立了定量理论，证明了有限图到图子极限的收敛速率及离散训练的一致性。
AI.translated_summary: 图神经微分方程通过用图神经网络参数化神经ODE速度场来建模连续时间图动力学。其局部的、与尺寸无关的滤波器暗示了一个零样本尺寸迁移原则：在小图上训练并部署到更大的相似图上而无需重新训练。我们为从图子采样的稀疏随机图上的这一原则发展了定量理论。我们考虑图子神经微分方程和伴随图子NDE作为前向和伴随GNDE系统的无限节点极限，并建立了适定性。对于具有稀疏参数α_n的n节点随机图，我们以高概率证明了GNDE解到图子NDE解的逐轨迹收敛速率为O((α_n n)^{-1/2})（至多差对数因子）。我们还建立了控制隐状态和参数梯度的伴随系统的一致时间收敛界。我们进一步研究了先离散后优化（DTO）和先优化后离散（OTD）训练。在显式欧拉离散化M步下，我们证明DTO和OTD是渐近一致的，隐状态和局部参数梯度的差异分别为O(1/M)和O(1/M^2)阶（至多差稀疏和对数因子）。在HSBM和帐篷图子上的实验支持了理论速率，而在四类图子上的零样本迁移实验证明了学习到的GNDE在更大独立采样图上的准确部署。
AI.research_problem: 图神经微分方程在小图上训练、在大图上部署的零样本尺寸迁移原则缺乏严格的定量理论分析，包括有限图解到无限节点极限的收敛速率以及离散化训练方案的一致性。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了图子神经微分方程作为GNDE的无限节点极限，严格证明了GNDE解到Graphon-NDE解的逐轨迹收敛速率O((α_n n)^{-1/2})，并建立了伴随系统的一致时间收敛界以及DTO/OTD训练方案在显式欧拉离散下的渐近一致性。
AI.motivation: GNDE的局部且与尺寸无关的滤波器特性暗示了零样本尺寸迁移的可行性，但缺乏定量理论支撑，需要严格刻画有限图与无限节点极限之间的关系及离散训练的误差。
AI.method: 在从图子采样的稀疏随机图上，定义Graphon-NDE及伴随Graphon-NDE作为无限节点极限并证明适定性；利用概率论方法证明GNDE解的逐轨迹收敛；在显式欧拉离散下分析DTO和OTD两种训练方案的误差阶。
AI.experiments: 在HSBM和帐篷图子上验证理论收敛速率，并在四类图子上进行零样本迁移实验，测试学习到的GNDE在更大独立采样图上的部署精度。
AI.result: 实验结果支持理论预测的收敛速率，零样本迁移实验表明GNDE在更大图上部署准确，验证了尺寸迁移原则的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为GNDE的零样本尺寸迁移原则建立了严格的定量理论基础，证明了收敛速率和离散训练一致性，实验验证了理论分析的正确性。

title: Learning Probabilistic Filters with Strictly Proper Scoring Rules
summary: Bayesian filtering of partially and noisily observed dynamical systems seeks to infer the evolving conditional distribution of the state of a dynamical system, given observations, in an online fashion. This Bayesian filtering distribution is the natural object for uncertainty quantification, but it is rarely available as a supervised learning target. However, one can often use the forecast model to generate synthetic system trajectories, along with synthetic observations. We introduce the proper scoring ensemble filter (PSEF), an ensemble data assimilation method based on training an analysis map to approximate the filtering distribution using only synthetic state--observation trajectories. The analysis step is represented as a permutation-invariant, transformer-based map that takes as input a forecast ensemble and observations, producing an analysis ensemble. Training is based on strictly proper scoring rules -- with the energy score used in our implementation -- so that probabilistic accuracy is rewarded over the whole probability distribution. We prove that, under a realizability assumption, the population objective is minimized by the true Bayesian filtering distribution. We also derive the finite-ensemble empirical objective used in training and relate its single state--observation trajectory form to the population objective, using a mean-field consistency argument. Numerical experiments show that the learned filter accurately approximates challenging filtering distributions, including nonlinear, non-Gaussian, and multi-modal posteriors, and achieves stronger performance in data assimilation tasks than classical methods or learning-based methods with mean-squared-error objectives. For close-to-Gaussian problems, learning a correction to the EnKF is the best approach, while for highly non-Gaussian problems an end-to-end approach that discards this inductive bias is superior.

AI.tldr: 提出PSEF方法，用适当评分规则训练Transformer分析映射，从合成数据近似贝叶斯滤波分布。
AI.translated_summary: 对部分且含噪声观测的动力学系统进行贝叶斯滤波，旨在以在线方式推断动力学系统状态在给定观测下的演化条件分布。该贝叶斯滤波分布是不确定性量化的自然对象，但很少作为监督学习目标可用。然而，人们通常可以利用预报模型生成合成的系统轨迹以及合成观测。我们引入了适当评分集合滤波器（PSEF），这是一种集合数据同化方法，基于训练一个分析映射来仅使用合成的状态-观测轨迹近似滤波分布。分析步骤被表示为一个置换不变的、基于Transformer的映射，以预报集合和观测作为输入，产生分析集合。训练基于严格适当评分规则——在我们的实现中使用能量分数——从而在整个概率分布上奖励概率准确性。我们证明，在可实现性假设下，总体目标由真实的贝叶斯滤波分布最小化。我们还推导了训练中使用的有限集合经验目标，并利用平均场一致性论证将其单状态-观测轨迹形式与总体目标联系起来。数值实验表明，学习到的滤波器能准确近似具有挑战性的滤波分布，包括非线性、非高斯和多模态后验分布，并在数据同化任务中取得比经典方法或使用均方误差目标的学习方法更强的性能。对于接近高斯的问题，学习对集合卡尔曼滤波（EnKF）的修正是最佳方法，而对于高度非高斯的问题，丢弃这一归纳偏置的端到端方法更为优越。
AI.research_problem: 贝叶斯滤波分布是不确定性量化的自然目标，但很少可作为监督学习目标直接使用；现有基于学习的方法多采用均方误差目标，无法在整个概率分布上保证概率准确性。
AI.key_innovation: 提出PSEF方法，将分析步骤建模为置换不变的Transformer映射，并采用严格适当评分规则（能量分数）作为训练目标，仅从合成的状态-观测轨迹学习近似贝叶斯滤波分布。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯滤波分布虽为不确定性量化的理想对象，但难以直接作为监督学习目标；而预报模型可生成合成轨迹，为学习滤波分布提供了数据来源。现有基于均方误差的学习方法无法在全分布层面奖励概率准确性。
AI.method: 将分析步骤表示为置换不变的基于Transformer的映射，输入预报集合与观测，输出分析集合；以严格适当评分规则（能量分数）为训练目标；理论上证明在可实现性假设下总体目标由真实贝叶斯滤波分布最小化，并通过平均场一致性论证将有限集合经验目标与总体目标关联。
AI.experiments: 在包括非线性、非高斯和多模态后验的挑战性滤波问题上进行数值实验，与经典方法和基于均方误差目标的学习方法对比，并分别考察接近高斯与高度非高斯场景。
AI.result: 学习到的滤波器能准确近似挑战性滤波分布，在数据同化任务中优于经典方法和基于均方误差的学习方法；接近高斯问题时学习EnKF修正最佳，高度非高斯时端到端方法更优。
AI.conclusion: PSEF通过适当评分规则训练的Transformer分析映射能有效近似贝叶斯滤波分布，在多种滤波场景中表现优异；应根据问题非高斯程度决定是否保留EnKF归纳偏置。

categories: 数据驱动有效动力学/降阶建模
title: Recovering Governing Equations from Solution Data: Identifiability Bounds for Linear and Nonlinear ODEs
summary: Learning governing equations from observed solution data is a fundamental challenge in scientific machine learning \cite{bruntonDiscoveringGoverningEquations2016,kovachkiNeuralOperatorLearning2023,longPDENetLearningPDEs2018,rudyDatadrivenDiscoveryPartial2017,raonicConvolutionalNeuralOperators2023}, yet the theoretical conditions under which a ground-truth ODE can be uniquely and stably identified from multiple solution observations remain largely undeveloped, and no quantitative analysis of the sample complexity of such learning tasks exists in the literature. To address this gap, we introduce the Hausdorff distance on solution sets as the natural metric for comparing differential equations, since it captures the worst-case separation between two equations over all admissible initial conditions and thus encodes the minimax structure of the identification problem. We establish identifiability bounds for governing ODEs across a wide class of structure equations--ranging from linear ODEs to nonlinear classes with Lipschitz (Hölder)-continuous vector fields--characterizing precisely when two distinct equations can be distinguished from solution data. Using this metric, we derive metric entropy estimates for the relevant ODE classes and analyze sample complexity bounds, quantifying how many solution observations are needed to reliably recover the governing equation.

AI.tldr: 引入解集Hausdorff距离，建立ODE可识别性与样本复杂度的理论框架。
AI.translated_summary: 从观测解数据中学习控制方程是科学机器学习中的一个基本挑战，然而从多个解观测中唯一且稳定地识别真实ODE的理论条件在很大程度上尚未发展，且文献中尚不存在对此类学习任务样本复杂度的定量分析。为填补这一空白，我们引入解集上的Hausdorff距离作为比较微分方程的自然度量，因为它刻画了两个方程在所有容许初始条件下的最坏情况分离程度，从而编码了识别问题的极小极大结构。我们在一大类结构方程中建立了控制ODE的可识别性界——从线性ODE到具有Lipschitz（Hölder）连续向量场的非线性类——精确刻画了何时可以从解数据中区分两个不同的方程。利用该度量，我们推导了相关ODE类的度量熵估计，并分析了样本复杂度界，量化了可靠恢复控制方程所需的解观测数量。
AI.research_problem: 从解观测数据中唯一且稳定地识别真实ODE的理论条件尚未建立，且缺乏对此类学习任务样本复杂度的定量分析。
AI.key_innovation: 引入解集上的Hausdorff距离作为比较微分方程的自然度量，该度量编码了识别问题的极小极大结构，从而为可识别性和样本复杂度分析提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习中从数据发现方程是核心问题，但现有工作缺乏对ODE可识别性的严格理论条件和样本复杂度的定量分析，亟需填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 在从线性ODE到Lipschitz（Hölder）连续向量场非线性ODE的广泛类别上，利用Hausdorff距离建立可识别性界，推导度量熵估计，并据此分析样本复杂度界。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论研究，摘要中未涉及具体实验。
AI.result: 精确刻画了两个不同方程何时可从解数据中区分，并给出了可靠恢复控制方程所需解观测数量的定量样本复杂度界。
AI.conclusion: 通过Hausdorff距离框架，首次为ODE的可识别性和样本复杂度提供了系统的定量理论分析，涵盖从线性到Lipschitz/Hölder非线性方程类。

categories: 随机微分方程识别
title: Equivariance and Augmentation for Bayesian Neural Networks
summary: Symmetries are important for many deep learning tasks, ranging from applications in the sciences to medical imaging. However, there is an ongoing debate about whether to impose symmetry constraints on the neural network architecture (yielding equivariant neural networks) or learn them from augmented training data. Although equivariant networks are well-studied theoretically, much less is known about data augmentation, since analyzing augmentation requires control over the training dynamics. Inspired by recent results that show that augmented infinite deep ensembles are exactly equivariant, we study data augmentation for Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) trained with variational inference. We focus on variational distributions in the exponential family and derive conditions under which exact equivariance is reached. We furthermore obtain bounds on the equivariance error and introduce three novel symmetrization techniques which boost the effect of data augmentation in this setting. We conduct extensive numerical experiments which show that one of our symmetrization methods (orbit expansion) outperforms the baseline in both equivariance and overall performance. Our code is available at github.com/dmw1998/augment-BNNs

AI.tldr: 提出三种对称化技术，证明贝叶斯神经网络中数据增强可实现精确等变性。
AI.translated_summary: 对称性在许多深度学习任务中非常重要，涵盖从科学应用到医学成像等领域。然而，关于是将对称性约束施加于神经网络架构（从而得到等变神经网络）还是从增强的训练数据中学习对称性，一直存在争论。尽管等变网络在理论上已被充分研究，但对数据增强的了解却少得多，因为分析增强需要对训练动态进行控制。受近期结果表明增强的无限深度集成恰好是等变的这一发现的启发，我们研究了通过变分推断训练的贝叶斯神经网络（BNNs）中的数据增强。我们聚焦于指数族中的变分分布，并推导出达到精确等变性的条件。我们进一步获得了等变误差的界限，并引入了三种新的对称化技术，以在该设置下增强数据增强的效果。我们进行了大量数值实验，结果表明我们的一种对称化方法（轨道扩展）在等变性和整体性能上均优于基线。我们的代码可在 github.com/dmw1998/augment-BNNs 获取。
AI.research_problem: 数据增强在实现对称性方面的理论分析远不如等变神经网络成熟，尤其是在贝叶斯神经网络中，数据增强如何实现等变性缺乏理论理解。
AI.key_innovation: 针对指数族变分分布的贝叶斯神经网络，推导出数据增强达到精确等变性的条件，获得等变误差界限，并提出三种新的对称化技术（包括轨道扩展）。
AI.motivation: 等变网络已有充分理论研究，但数据增强的等变性分析因需控制训练动态而较少被研究；近期关于增强无限深度集成恰好等变的结果为研究BNN中的数据增强提供了启发。
AI.method: 研究变分推断训练的贝叶斯神经网络，聚焦指数族变分分布，推导精确等变性条件，获得等变误差界限，并提出三种对称化技术以增强数据增强效果。
AI.experiments: 进行了大量数值实验，对比所提出的对称化方法与基线在等变性和整体性能上的表现。
AI.result: 轨道扩展方法在等变性和整体性能上均优于基线方法。

title: Integrable pentagram-type maps on polyhedra via partial difference operators
summary: This paper introduces a family of natural generalizations of the pentagram map from polygons to (twisted) polyhedra and proves their integrability through the partial difference operators. A canonical special case, which corresponds to the discrete Laplace transformation of discrete conjugate nets, is investigated in detail. We first establish a canonical bijection between the projective equivalence classes of these polyhedra in $\mathbb{RP}^3$ and the spectral data of doubly periodic partial difference operators modulo the gauge actions. Furthermore, we prove the complete integrability of these pentagram-type maps by explicitly identifying them with the refactorization maps on the Poisson-Lie group of pseudo partial difference operators. This algebraic identification naturally yields an explicit Lax representation and an $r$-matrix induced Poisson bracket for the geometric dynamics.

AI.tldr: 将五角星映射推广至多面体并证明其完全可积性，给出Lax表示与r矩阵结构。
AI.translated_summary: 本文引入了五角星映射从多边形到（扭曲）多面体的一族自然推广，并通过偏差分算子证明了其可积性。我们详细研究了一个典范特例，它对应于离散共轭网的离散拉普拉斯变换。我们首先建立了RP^3中这些多面体的射影等价类与在规范作用下的双周期偏差分算子谱数据之间的典范双射。进一步，我们通过将这些五角星型映射与伪偏差分算子的泊松-李群上的重因子分解映射显式等同，证明了这些映射的完全可积性。这一代数等同自然地导出了几何动力学的显式Lax表示和由r矩阵诱导的泊松括号。
AI.research_problem: 如何将经典的五角星映射从多边形自然推广到高维多面体，并证明其可积性，是本文所解决的核心问题。
AI.key_innovation: 通过偏差分算子的谱数据建立多面体射影等价类的双射，并将五角星型映射与伪偏差分算子泊松-李群上的重因子分解映射显式等同，从而获得Lax表示与r矩阵结构。
AI.motivation: 五角星映射在多边形情形已被证明是完全可积的，将其推广至多面体并建立相应的可积性理论是自然的几何与代数问题。
AI.method: 利用偏差分算子的谱理论、泊松-李群上的重因子分解映射以及r矩阵理论，建立几何动力学与代数结构之间的联系。

AI.result: 建立了多面体射影等价类与谱数据的典范双射，证明了五角星型映射的完全可积性，并显式给出了Lax表示和r矩阵诱导的泊松括号。
AI.conclusion: 五角星映射向多面体的推广是一族完全可积的动力系统，其可积性可通过偏差分算子的代数结构自然刻画。

title: SSM Adapters via Hankel Reduced-order Modeling: Injection Site Determines Task Suitability in Long-Context Fine-Tuning
summary: While parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) typically targets attention projectors, its efficacy for tasks requiring sequential state accumulation remains under-explored. We examine if PEFT for such tasks can benefit from state space model (SSMs) adapters, and if MLP blocks are better injection sites. We introduce Hankel Reduced order Model (HRM) adapter, an SSM-based residual module initialized via Balanced Truncation of empirical Hankel Grammians. By leveraging the time-invariance of the system matrix $\bar{A}$, HRM enables an exact FFT-based parallel scan, achieving computational parity with LoRA across all context lengths. In iso-parametric evaluations on Mistral-7B (8.4M trainable parameters), HRM outperforms LoRA variants on LongBench tasks, including QuALITY (+34.8\% relative accuracy) and QMSum (+71.6\% relative ROUGE-1). HRM further demonstrates consistent superiority across 18 configurations of synthetic state-tracking (DFA, Parity) and character-level language modeling (enwik8). Gate analysis reveals that HRM adapters effectively learn to modulate recurrence, providing a robust architectural alternative to low-rank adaptation for long-context sequence modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出基于状态空间模型的HRM适配器，在长上下文任务上显著优于LoRA。
AI.translated_summary: 参数高效微调（PEFT）通常针对注意力投影器，但其在需要序列状态累积的任务上的有效性仍未被充分探索。我们研究了此类任务是否能从状态空间模型（SSM）适配器中受益，以及MLP块是否是更好的注入位置。我们提出了Hankel降阶模型（HRM）适配器，这是一种基于SSM的残差模块，通过经验Hankel Gramian的平衡截断进行初始化。通过利用系统矩阵$\bar{A}$的时不变性，HRM实现了基于FFT的精确并行扫描，在所有上下文长度上达到了与LoRA同等的计算效率。在Mistral-7B上的等参数评估中（8.4M可训练参数），HRM在LongBench任务上优于LoRA变体，包括QuALITY（相对准确率+34.8%）和QMSum（相对ROUGE-1 +71.6%）。HRM还在合成状态追踪（DFA、Parity）和字符级语言建模（enwik8）的18种配置中展现出持续的优越性。门控分析表明，HRM适配器能有效学习调节递归，为长上下文序列建模提供了低秩适应的稳健架构替代方案。
AI.research_problem: PEFT通常针对注意力投影器，但在需要序列状态累积的任务（如长上下文建模）上效果不明确；SSM适配器是否适用于PEFT以及MLP块是否为更优注入点尚未被探索。
AI.key_innovation: 提出HRM适配器——基于SSM的残差模块，通过经验Hankel Gramian的平衡截断初始化，并利用系统矩阵的时不变性实现基于FFT的精确并行扫描，在计算效率上与LoRA持平。
AI.motivation: PEFT在需要序列状态累积的任务上探索不足，SSM具有建模序列动态的天然优势，将其作为适配器注入MLP块可能比传统低秩注意力适应更适合长上下文场景。
AI.method: 设计HRM适配器作为SSM残差模块，采用平衡截断法对经验Hankel Gramian进行初始化；利用系统矩阵$\bar{A}$的时不变性实现FFT精确并行扫描，保证与LoRA同等的计算复杂度。
AI.experiments: 在Mistral-7B上进行等参数评估（8.4M可训练参数），测试LongBench任务（QuALITY、QMSum）、18种合成状态追踪配置（DFA、Parity）及字符级语言建模（enwik8），并与LoRA变体对比。
AI.result: HRM在QuALITY上相对准确率提升34.8%，在QMSum上相对ROUGE-1提升71.6%；在18种状态追踪配置和enwik8上均持续优于LoRA变体；门控分析显示HRM能有效学习调节递归。
AI.conclusion: HRM适配器为长上下文序列建模提供了低秩适应的稳健架构替代方案，SSM适配器在需要状态累积的任务中具有显著优势。

title: Stochastic Gradient Optimization with Model-Assisted Sampling
summary: This work addresses the problem of variance in stochastic gradient estimation for machine learning optimization. Deep learning relies on mini-batch methods such as stochastic gradient descent, which approximate full gradients but introduce noise, creating trade-offs between convergence stability, speed, and generalization. Existing methods, including variance reduction techniques (e.g., SVRG and SAG) and adaptive optimizers, aim to mitigate gradient noise but may introduce additional computational overhead. We propose a model-assisted sampling framework that interprets mini-batch gradients through survey sampling theory, treating the dataset as a fixed finite population and gradients as sample-based estimates. Our aim is to bridge machine learning optimization and survey sampling theory by combining their perspectives on sample-based estimation and variance reduction. By incorporating auxiliary gradient-prediction models, we construct more efficient gradient estimators, with uniform sampling arising as a special case when no auxiliary information is used. Our approach integrates easily with existing optimizers, improving efficiency without altering their dynamics. Empirical results on synthetic and six benchmark datasets show performance gains in 71-86% of the experiments, particularly for medium-sized input spaces in our benchmarks. Notably, with momentum-based optimizers such as AdamW, the proposed estimator achieves clearly better generalization in roughly half the training epochs compared to baseline estimator.

AI.tldr: 提出模型辅助采样框架，利用辅助梯度预测降低随机梯度方差，提升优化效率与泛化性能。
AI.translated_summary: 本工作解决了机器学习优化中随机梯度估计的方差问题。深度学习依赖小批量方法（如随机梯度下降）来近似全梯度，但这会引入噪声，在收敛稳定性、速度和泛化性之间产生权衡。现有方法包括方差降低技术（如SVRG和SAG）以及自适应优化器，旨在缓解梯度噪声，但可能引入额外的计算开销。我们提出了一种模型辅助采样框架，通过抽样调查理论来解释小批量梯度，将数据集视为固定有限总体，将梯度视为基于样本的估计。我们的目标是通过结合机器学习优化和抽样调查理论在基于样本的估计和方差降低方面的视角，实现两者的融合。通过引入辅助梯度预测模型，我们构建了更高效的梯度估计器，当不使用辅助信息时，均匀采样成为其特例。我们的方法易于与现有优化器集成，在不改变其动态特性的情况下提高效率。在合成数据和六个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，在71%-86%的实验中获得了性能提升，尤其是在基准测试中的中等规模输入空间上表现突出。值得注意的是，在使用基于动量的优化器（如AdamW）时，所提出的估计器在约一半的训练轮次内即可实现明显更优的泛化性能。
AI.research_problem: 随机梯度下降等小批量方法在近似全梯度时引入噪声，导致收敛稳定性、速度和泛化性之间的权衡；现有方差降低技术（如SVRG、SAG）和自适应优化器虽能缓解噪声，但可能带来额外计算开销。
AI.key_innovation: 将抽样调查理论引入机器学习优化，提出模型辅助采样框架，利用辅助梯度预测模型构建更高效的梯度估计器，均匀采样为其特例，且不改变现有优化器的动态特性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习优化中随机梯度估计的方差问题长期存在，现有方法在降低噪声与计算开销之间存在矛盾，需要一种既能有效降低方差又不引入显著额外开销的方法。
AI.method: 将数据集视为固定有限总体，梯度视为基于样本的估计；引入辅助梯度预测模型构建更高效的梯度估计器；框架可无缝集成现有优化器，不改变其动态特性。
AI.experiments: 在合成数据和六个基准数据集上进行实验，对比所提估计器与基线方法，测试不同优化器（包括AdamW等动量优化器）下的表现。
AI.result: 在71%-86%的实验中获得性能提升，尤其在中等规模输入空间上表现突出；使用AdamW等动量优化器时，约一半训练轮次即可实现明显更优的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 模型辅助采样框架能有效降低随机梯度估计方差，在不改变优化器动态特性的前提下提升效率和泛化性能，为机器学习优化与抽样调查理论的结合提供了新视角。
AI.limitations: 摘要中提到性能提升在中等规模输入空间上尤为突出，暗示在大规模或小规模输入空间上效果可能有限；此外未提及框架在更大规模模型或更复杂任务上的验证。

title: Quantum Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Integro and Fractional PDEs
summary: Quantum neural networks have emerged as powerful models for approximating nonlinear functions. Yet their use in solving integro-differential equations (IDEs) and fractional integro-partial differential equations (FIPDEs), which involve inherently nonlocal operators, remains unexplored. This work introduces a quantum physics-informed neural network (QPINN) framework that combines a quantum neural network with the governing equations of general nonlinear IDEs and FIPDEs. The proposed quantum network uses an affine feature map and variational quantum circuits to produce trial solutions with explicit trigonometric structure. We prove a quantitative $L^{2}(μ)$ universal approximation theorem for this architecture, achieving a convergence rate of $\mathcal{O}(n^{-1/2})$. This extends classical Fourier approximation theory to quantum circuits for physics-informed learning. We propose two QPINN variants: the numerical-quadrature QPINN (N-QPINN), which handles nonlocal integrals and fractional operators via high-order numerical quadrature while computing local derivatives through automatic differentiation of quantum trial solutions; and the auxiliary-function QPINN (A-QPINN), which eliminates numerical quadrature by introducing auxiliary variables that reformulate each integro-differential equation as an equivalent coupled system of partial differential equations, enabling a multi-output quantum neural network to simultaneously represent the solution and its associated variables. A series of numerical experiments demonstrates that the proposed QPINN framework accurately captures the behavior of nonlinear IDEs and FIPDEs and outperforms classical physics-informed neural networks.

AI.tldr: 提出量子物理信息神经网络框架求解积分微分方程与分数阶偏微分方程，性能优于经典方法。
AI.translated_summary: 量子神经网络已成为逼近非线性函数的强大模型。然而，它们在求解涉及本质非局部算子的积分微分方程（IDE）和分数阶积分偏微分方程（FIPDE）方面的应用仍未被探索。本文提出了一种量子物理信息神经网络（QPINN）框架，将量子神经网络与一般非线性IDE和FIPDE的控制方程相结合。所提出的量子网络使用仿射特征映射和变分量子电路来生成具有显式三角结构的试验解。我们证明了该架构的定量L²(μ)万能逼近定理，实现了O(n^{-1/2})的收敛速率。这将经典傅里叶逼近理论扩展到用于物理信息学习的量子电路。我们提出了两种QPINN变体：数值求积QPINN（N-QPINN），通过高阶数值求积处理非局部积分和分数阶算子，同时通过量子试验解的自动微分计算局部导数；以及辅助函数QPINN（A-QPINN），通过引入辅助变量消除数值求积，将每个积分微分方程重新表述为等价的偏微分方程耦合系统，使多输出量子神经网络能够同时表示解及其相关变量。一系列数值实验表明，所提出的QPINN框架能够准确捕捉非线性IDE和FIPDE的行为，并优于经典物理信息神经网络。
AI.research_problem: 量子神经网络在求解涉及非局部算子的积分微分方程（IDE）和分数阶积分偏微分方程（FIPDE）方面的应用尚未被探索，存在明显的研究空白。
AI.key_innovation: 提出QPINN框架，利用仿射特征映射和变分量子电路生成具有显式三角结构的试验解，并证明L²(μ)万能逼近定理，收敛速率为O(n^{-1/2})；同时设计N-QPINN和A-QPINN两种变体分别处理非局部积分问题。
AI.motivation: 量子神经网络虽已成功用于非线性函数逼近，但求解含非局部算子的IDE和FIPDE仍是空白，需将量子方法扩展至此类方程以填补该领域研究缺口。
AI.method: 构建量子网络采用仿射特征映射与变分量子电路生成三角结构试验解；提出两种变体——N-QPINN用高阶数值求积处理非局部积分和分数阶算子、用自动微分计算局部导数，A-QPINN引入辅助变量将IDE转化为等价PDE耦合系统以消除数值求积，由多输出量子网络同时表示解及辅助变量。
AI.experiments: 开展了一系列数值实验，在非线性IDE和FIPDE上验证所提QPINN框架的求解精度与性能，并与经典物理信息神经网络进行对比。
AI.result: QPINN框架能准确捕捉非线性IDE和FIPDE的行为，且在性能上优于经典物理信息神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的QPINN框架成功将量子神经网络扩展至IDE和FIPDE的求解，提供了L²(μ)万能逼近定理的理论保证，并通过两种变体有效处理非局部算子，数值实验验证了其优越性。

title: Kolmogorov equations for stochastic convective Brinkman-Forchheimer equations forced by Lévy Noise and its application to infinite horizon problems

title: Scalability of Morality: A Particle-Based Numerical Study on the Decoupling of Law and Ethics in Large-Scale Populations
summary: This study introduces a particle-based computational framework to investigate the scalability of morality and the systemic decoupling of formal law from decentralized social ethics in expanding populations. While micro-societies reinforce ethical conduct through local reciprocity, macroscale systems introduce anonymity that strains cognitive memory limitations. We model individual agents as discrete particles with finite memory capacities ($L$) and dynamically evolving, stochastic choice profiles ($μ$) regulated by non-linear social pressure switches. Monte Carlo ensemble simulations demonstrate a distinct, non-linear phase transition as the population scales ($N \to \infty$). When the population metric outpaces memory capacity ($N \gg L$), the local re-encounter probability drops as $\mathcal{O}(L/N)$. This structural dilution neutralizes decentralized peer-to-peer accountability, causing global behavioral norms to decouple from moral baselines and drift toward a minimalist legal floor. Furthermore, cyclic scale experiments expose a prominent, path-dependent hysteresis loop, mathematically formalizing the non-Markovian inertia and irreversible nature of moral decay in self-organizing social systems.

AI.tldr: 人口扩张使局部道德问责失效，行为规范不可逆地退化为最低法律底线。
AI.translated_summary: 本研究引入了一种基于粒子的计算框架，用于研究道德的可扩展性以及在不断扩张的人口中正式法律与去中心化社会伦理的系统性脱钩。微观社会通过局部互惠来强化道德行为，而宏观系统引入的匿名性则对认知记忆能力造成了压力。我们将个体智能体建模为具有有限记忆容量（$L$）和动态演化、随机选择特征（$μ$）的离散粒子，其行为受非线性社会压力开关调节。蒙特卡洛集合模拟显示，随着人口规模扩大（$N \to \infty$），出现了明显的非线性相变。当人口指标超过记忆容量（$N \gg L$）时，局部重逢概率以$\mathcal{O}(L/N)$的量级下降。这种结构性稀释瓦解了去中心化的对等问责机制，导致全局行为规范与道德基线脱钩，并向最低限度的法律底线漂移。此外，循环尺度实验揭示了一个显著的路径依赖滞后回环，从数学上形式化了自组织社会系统中道德衰败的非马尔可夫惯性和不可逆性。
AI.research_problem: 在人口规模扩张时，去中心化的社会伦理如何与正式法律发生系统性脱钩？微观社会中的局部互惠机制在宏观尺度下因匿名性和认知记忆限制而失效，但这一过程的定量机制和相变特征尚不清楚。
AI.key_innovation: 提出基于粒子的计算框架，将个体建模为具有有限记忆容量和动态随机选择特征的离散粒子，受非线性社会压力开关调节，首次以数学形式化揭示了道德衰败的相变、路径依赖滞后效应及不可逆性。
AI.motivation: 微观社会通过局部互惠维持道德行为，但宏观系统中的匿名性超越了人类认知记忆限制，需要定量理解这种尺度变化如何导致道德规范的系统性退化及法律底线的漂移。
AI.method: 将个体智能体建模为具有有限记忆容量（L）和动态演化随机选择特征（μ）的离散粒子，通过非线性社会压力开关调节行为，采用蒙特卡洛集合模拟进行计算实验。
AI.experiments: 开展了蒙特卡洛集合模拟，考察人口规模扩展（N→∞）时的相变行为；并进行了循环尺度实验，观察人口扩张与收缩过程中的路径依赖性和滞后效应。
AI.result: 当N≫L时，局部重逢概率以O(L/N)下降，去中心化对等问责机制失效，全局行为规范与道德基线脱钩并向最低法律底线漂移；循环尺度实验揭示了显著的路径依赖滞后回环。
AI.conclusion: 人口扩张导致道德衰败呈现非线性相变特征，具有非马尔可夫惯性和不可逆性，自组织社会系统中的道德退化一旦发生便难以逆转。

categories: 随机微分方程识别
title: Explaining Temporal Graph Neural Networks via Feature-induced Information Flow
summary: Event-based Temporal Graph Neural Networks (ETGNNs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of applications, including social network analysis, epidemic tracing, recommender systems, and political event forecasting. However, their increasing complexity poses significant challenges for explainability. Existing explanation methods focus only on a subset of the information flow within ETGNNs, typically tracing contributions from the event-related embeddings to the output. Consequently, they overlook the important pathways through event-induced variables, which mediate interactions between nodes and thereby play a central role in capturing long-range temporal dependencies. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel attribution method that analyzes the \emph{entire} information flow through all event-associated variables. Our method is built upon the recent Normalized Relevance Measure (NRM) framework, which enables explicit quantification of information flow originating from event embeddings as well as information flow passing through event-induced variables. It also ensures comparability of latent variables across layers, and supports higher-order analysis of interactions between events. To handle the architectural complexity of ETGNNs, we extend the NRM framework with a modular decomposition procedure that facilitates the systematic construction of relevance structure for complex neural architectures. We evaluate our approach on two synthetic datasets for epidemic tracing and social dynamics, as well as a real-world dataset of political event networks. Our qualitative and quantitative experiments show that our method consistently outperforms existing explanation approaches while producing more human-interpretable explanations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于NRM框架的ETGNN全信息流归因方法，显著提升解释性能与可解释性。
AI.translated_summary: 事件驱动时序图神经网络（ETGNNs）在社交网络分析、流行病追踪、推荐系统和政治事件预测等广泛应用中展现了出色的性能。然而，其日益增加的复杂性对可解释性提出了重大挑战。现有解释方法仅关注ETGNNs内部信息流的一个子集，通常只追踪从事件相关嵌入到输出的贡献，从而忽略了通过事件诱导变量的重要路径，而这些变量介导节点间的交互，在捕获长程时序依赖中发挥核心作用。为克服这一局限性，我们提出了一种新的归因方法，分析通过所有事件关联变量的完整信息流。该方法基于最近的归一化相关性度量（NRM）框架，能够显式量化源自事件嵌入的信息流以及通过事件诱导变量传递的信息流。它还确保了跨层潜在变量的可比性，并支持事件间交互的高阶分析。为应对ETGNNs的架构复杂性，我们通过模块化分解过程扩展了NRM框架，便于为复杂神经架构系统构建相关性结构。我们在两个合成数据集（流行病追踪和社会动态）以及一个真实世界的政治事件网络数据集上评估了该方法。定性和定量实验表明，我们的方法始终优于现有解释方法，同时生成更具人类可解释性的解释。
AI.research_problem: 现有ETGNNs解释方法仅追踪事件相关嵌入到输出的信息流子集，忽略了通过事件诱导变量的关键路径，而这些变量介导节点间交互并捕获长程时序依赖，导致解释不完整。
AI.key_innovation: 提出基于归一化相关性度量（NRM）框架的全信息流归因方法，结合模块化分解过程，系统量化包括事件嵌入和事件诱导变量在内的所有事件关联变量的信息流贡献，并支持事件间交互的高阶分析。
AI.motivation: ETGNNs日益复杂导致可解释性不足，现有方法遗漏了事件诱导变量这一捕获长程时序依赖的关键路径，亟需一种能分析完整信息流的解释方法。
AI.method: 基于NRM框架构建归因方法，显式量化源自事件嵌入及通过事件诱导变量传递的信息流，确保跨层潜在变量可比性；通过模块化分解过程扩展NRM以应对ETGNNs的架构复杂性，系统构建复杂神经架构的相关性结构。
AI.experiments: 在两个合成数据集（流行病追踪和社会动态）及一个真实世界政治事件网络数据集上进行定性和定量评估，与现有解释方法进行对比。
AI.result: 该方法在所有数据集上始终优于现有解释方法，同时生成更具人类可解释性的解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析包括事件诱导变量路径在内的完整信息流，所提方法为ETGNNs提供了更全面、更准确的归因分析，显著提升了解释质量。

categories: 随机微分方程识别
title: Effective Covariance Dynamics in Solvable High-Dimensional GANs
summary: We study a solvable high-dimensional model of generative adversarial network (GAN) training in which a linear generator learns a low-dimensional subspace from data with structured latent covariance. Prior solvable GAN analyses assume unconditional signals with diagonal latent covariance; we extend the multi-feature discriminator setting to class-dependent, correlated, and non-zero-mean latent structure. For the quadratic energy discriminator, all such heterogeneity enters the dynamics through a probability-weighted effective second moment. We prove that the stochastic microscopic training process converges, in the high-dimensional limit, to deterministic ordinary differential equations governed by this effective covariance. In the matched-covariance specialization, the stability analysis yields a mode-wise solvable interval determined by the learning rates and noise level: learning begins when the leading effective eigenvalue crosses the lower threshold, while full recovery requires all relevant effective modes to remain within the interval. This reveals a signal-boosting mechanism: low-rank correlations can lift weak directions above the learnability threshold, whereas overly strong correlations destabilize recovery. Numerical simulations validate the ODE, phase boundary, and boosting mechanism. Experiments on MNIST, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-10 further show that informed generator covariance improves alignment with the data-driven reference subspace.

AI.tldr: 提出可解高维GAN模型，揭示低秩相关性可增强弱信号方向的可学习性。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究了一个可解的高维生成对抗网络（GAN）训练模型，其中线性生成器从具有结构化潜在协方差的数据中学习低维子空间。先前的可解GAN分析假设无条件信号且潜在协方差为对角矩阵；我们将多特征判别器设置扩展到类相关、相关且非零均值的潜在结构。对于二次能量判别器，所有此类异质性通过概率加权有效二阶矩进入动力学。我们证明了随机微观训练过程在高维极限下收敛到由该有效协方差支配的确定性常微分方程。在匹配协方差特化中，稳定性分析产生了一个由学习率和噪声水平决定的逐模式可解区间：当主导有效特征值越过下阈值时学习开始，而完全恢复要求所有相关有效模式保持在区间内。这揭示了一种信号增强机制：低秩相关性可以将弱方向提升至可学习阈值之上，而过强的相关性则会使恢复失稳。数值模拟验证了ODE、相边界和增强机制。在MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10上的实验进一步表明，信息化的生成器协方差改善了与数据驱动参考子空间的对齐。
AI.research_problem: 现有可解GAN分析仅限于无条件信号和对角潜在协方差，无法刻画类相关、相关且非零均值的潜在结构对GAN训练动力学的影响。
AI.key_innovation: 将可解高维GAN分析扩展到类相关、相关且非零均值的潜在结构，证明训练过程在高维极限下收敛于确定性ODE，并发现低秩相关性的信号增强机制。
AI.motivation: 真实数据的潜在结构通常具有类别依赖性、相关性和非零均值，而先前可解GAN理论未涵盖这些异质性，需要更通用的理论框架来理解其对训练动力学的影响。
AI.method: 构建线性生成器与二次能量判别器的高维可解模型，将异质性通过概率加权有效二阶矩引入动力学，利用高维极限证明随机微观训练收敛到确定性ODE，并进行匹配协方差特化下的稳定性分析。
AI.experiments: 通过数值模拟验证ODE预测、相边界和信号增强机制；在MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10上测试信息化的生成器协方差对参考子空间对齐的影响。
AI.result: 理论预测的ODE、相边界和增强机制均被数值模拟验证；低秩相关性可将弱方向提升至可学习阈值之上，但过强相关性导致恢复失稳；真实数据实验表明信息化协方差改善子空间对齐。
AI.conclusion: 结构化潜在协方差通过有效二阶矩统一进入GAN训练动力学，低秩相关性具有信号增强效应但存在稳定性权衡，为生成器协方差设计提供了理论指导。
AI.limitations: 模型限于线性生成器和二次能量判别器，理论分析在高维极限下成立，对非线性生成器和其他判别器架构的适用性尚待探索。

categories: 数据驱动有效动力学/降阶建模
title: Accelerated sampling using SamAdams variable timesteps and position-adaptive Langevin dynamics
summary: We introduce an accelerated Langevin-based sampling method that is based on two complementary devices: \emph{SamAdams} adaptive timestepping, which automatically shrinks the effective integration step in stiff regions of phase space using a relaxed stiffness monitor, and \emph{position-adaptive Langevin} (PAL) dynamics, which concentrates friction along the local force direction while preserving the canonical distribution as the exact invariant measure. The resulting combined scheme (SA-PAL) is implemented in a palindromic integrator which requires only one force evaluation per iteration through suitable organisation of the integration steps and by exploiting the rank-one-plus-scalar structure of the PAL friction tensor. We test the method on various model problems: the Rosenbrock function, a thin entropic channel, the Mueller-Brown potential, and a Bayesian parameterisation problem with a sparsity-inducing shrinkage prior. On the Rosenbrock and Mueller-Brown potentials mixing rates are improved by 1.5-3 times compared to fixed stepsize integration. Efficiency gains of more than an order of magnitude are documented in the other examples.

AI.tldr: 提出SA-PAL方法，结合自适应步长与位置自适应摩擦，在多种测试中显著提升Langevin采样效率。
AI.translated_summary: 我们引入了一种基于Langevin的加速采样方法，该方法基于两种互补机制：SamAdams自适应步长技术，通过松弛的刚性监测器在相空间的刚性区域自动缩小有效积分步长；以及位置自适应Langevin（PAL）动力学，将摩擦集中于局部力方向，同时保持正则分布作为精确的不变测度。所得到的组合方案（SA-PAL）在一个回文积分器中实现，通过合理组织积分步骤并利用PAL摩擦张量的秩一加标量结构，每次迭代仅需一次力评估。我们在多个模型问题上测试了该方法：Rosenbrock函数、薄熵通道、Müller-Brown势，以及一个带有稀疏诱导收缩先验的贝叶斯参数化问题。在Rosenbrock和Müller-Brown势上，与固定步长积分相比，混合速率提高了1.5至3倍。在其他示例中，效率提升超过一个数量级。
AI.research_problem: 在刚性区域和复杂势能景观中，固定步长的Langevin采样方法混合速率慢、计算效率低，难以高效采样。
AI.key_innovation: 将SamAdams自适应步长与位置自适应Langevin（PAL）动力学相结合，构建SA-PAL方案，在回文积分器中通过利用PAL摩擦张量的秩一加标量结构实现每次迭代仅需一次力评估。
AI.motivation: Langevin动力学采样在刚性区域和复杂多尺度势能中效率受限，需要在保持正则分布不变性的前提下加速混合并降低计算开销。
AI.method: 提出两种互补机制：SamAdams通过松弛刚性监测器自适应缩小刚性区域步长；PAL动力学将摩擦集中于局部力方向并保持正则分布为精确不变测度。两者组合为SA-PAL，在回文积分器中实现，每次迭代仅需一次力评估。
AI.experiments: 在Rosenbrock函数、薄熵通道、Müller-Brown势以及带稀疏诱导收缩先验的贝叶斯参数化问题上进行测试，与固定步长积分方法对比。
AI.result: Rosenbrock和Müller-Brown势上混合速率提升1.5至3倍；薄熵通道和贝叶斯参数化问题上效率提升超过一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: SA-PAL方法在多种模型问题上显著提升了Langevin采样的混合速率和计算效率，且每次迭代仅需一次力评估，兼顾精度与速度。
